summary: Dynamic By-Product Categories Feature - Iteration 192 PASSED. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Milling table headers show all 6 dynamic categories including custom 'Rejection Rice', New Milling Entry form has dynamic by-product percentage fields, Settings → By-Products page shows category management with all 6 categories. All export endpoints (Excel/PDF) return 200 with correct content types.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'rejection_rice' category in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic by-product categories feature verified. Key changes: (1) Backend uses get_byproduct_categories_list() for dynamic DB lookups instead of hardcoded arrays. (2) All export endpoints (milling-report/excel, milling-report/pdf, byproduct-sales/excel, byproduct-sales/pdf) now include dynamic columns. (3) Frontend MillingTracker.jsx fetches bpCategories API and renders dynamic table headers and form fields. (4) Settings → By-Products page allows CRUD operations on categories. (5) Custom category 'rejection_rice' (Rejection Rice / रिजेक्शन) is present and working.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/byproduct-stock - PASS (returns stock for all 6 dynamic categories)
frontend_ui_tests: 3. Milling table headers show dynamic columns - PASS (Bran, Kunda, Broken, Kanki, Husk%, Rejection Rice)
4. New Milling Entry form has dynamic by-product fields - PASS (includes Rejection Rice%)
5. Live Preview shows all dynamic categories - PASS
10. By-Product Categories management UI - PASS (shows all 6 categories)
